message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Task #3 confirmed complete - thank you">
Thank you for creating the POST /api/projects endpoint! The implementation was perfect:

✅ Auth with getAuthUser()
✅ Transaction with workspace creation
✅ Proper scores and analysis_data persistence
✅ Clean error handling

Your work enabled Task #4 to succeed. Excellent contribution to the team!

You can standby for now while we finish Task #7. 🎉
</teammate-message>

input.summary: Standing by - ready for next task
